response.overview: An Auschwitz Album Story shares the extraordinary survivor story of Mike and Joe Kreitenberg and their life-changing discovery in the Auschwitz Album: the only existing photographs of their family and neighbors who were lost in the Holocaust.
response.tagline: a unique window into what once was and that can never return, but offers a link to families lost and a culture decimated by the destructive forces of evil
response.title: An Auschwitz Album Story
